prompt:
Square 1:1 composition, TRANSPARENT background (full alpha outside shapes — no backdrop, no gradient panel).

STYLE: Flat minimal product-diagram illustration — heavily rounded rectangles, circles, pills; medium-bold organic strokes in warm taupe/beige (#4a3d32 through #6b5845) for neutral structure; soft sand / pale beige fills (#e8ddd0, #d4c4b0) where needed; subtle fine paper grain on filled areas.

ACCENT COLOR: The next paragraph names exactly ONE accent family. Use ONLY that family (soft pastel, not neon) for highlighted shapes: hubs, connector paths, key node fills, emphasis rings. All non-accent lines and fills stay beige/taupe neutrals. Do not introduce a second accent hue.

Geometry: dashed curved connectors OK; centered layout; generous margin at edges.

FORBIDDEN: text, letters, numbers, logos, watermarks, photorealism, scratchboard hatching, labeled flowchart boxes, isometric 3D with dimension text.

ACCENT FAMILY — SKY / CYAN-BLUE ONLY: #0ea5e9, #38bdf8, #7dd3fc, #bae6fd. Apply sky color to the broom, dustpan, and any swept particles.

Subject — CONTEXT JANITOR (must read as "janitor sweeping between tools" at thumbnail size): A large rounded broom or push-broom in the center, sweeping small scattered rounded-square "context fragments" (tiny pills and dots) from left to right between two disconnected rounded-rectangle tool pads at each side. The broom handle and bristles are sky-blue; the scattered fragments are a mix of beige neutrals and faint sky highlights. The two tool pads are beige/taupe outlines with soft sand fills. Optional small dustpan shape in sky-blue at the right side collecting the fragments.

Visual consistency: match Neotoma homepage ICP card icons — same rounded-stroke weight, paper grain on fills, centered composition, generous margin inside the square.

Square 1:1 composition, TRANSPARENT background (full alpha outside shapes — no backdrop, no gradient panel).

STYLE: Flat minimal product-diagram illustration — heavily rounded rectangles, circles, pills; medium-bold organic strokes in warm taupe/beige (#4a3d32 through #6b5845) for neutral structure; soft sand / pale beige fills (#e8ddd0, #d4c4b0) where needed; subtle fine paper grain on filled areas.

ACCENT COLOR — VIOLET / PURPLE ONLY: #8b5cf6, #a78bfa, #c4b5fd, #ddd6fe. Apply violet color to the monitor/eye shape and connecting watch-lines. All non-accent shapes stay beige/taupe neutrals.

FORBIDDEN: text, letters, numbers, logos, watermarks, photorealism, scratchboard hatching, labeled flowchart boxes, isometric 3D with dimension text.

Subject — BABYSITTER WATCHING OVER INFERENCE: A large rounded eye or monitor shape in the center (violet-accented rim and iris), looking down at two or three small rounded-rectangle agent shapes below. Dashed violet curved connector lines from the eye down to each small agent. Small agents are beige/taupe with sand fills. The eye dominates the composition. Centered, generous margins.

Visual consistency: match Neotoma homepage ICP card icons — same rounded-stroke weight, paper grain on fills, centered composition, generous margin inside the square.

Square 1:1, TRANSPARENT background. Flat minimal illustration with rounded shapes, medium-bold taupe/beige strokes (#4a3d32 to #6b5845), soft sand fills (#e8ddd0, #d4c4b0), paper grain texture.

ACCENT: amber only (#f59e0b, #fbbf24, #fcd34d). No other accent hue.

FORBIDDEN: text, letters, numbers, logos, watermarks, photorealism.

Subject: An archaeological dig cross-section. Three horizontal rounded-rectangle strata layers stacked vertically in beige/taupe. Top layer has a gap exposing a glowing amber pill-shaped artifact. A small amber trowel sits at the gap. Dashed amber connector lines from trowel to artifact. Centered, generous margins.

Visual consistency: match Neotoma homepage ICP card icons — same rounded-stroke weight, paper grain on fills, centered composition, generous margin inside the square.
